title: Squash Like An Egyptian 2019 Jr Summer Camp

content:
Coaches Ibrahim and Omar ran an amazing summer camp with the coordination and supervision of Heather Sanregret. There was pizza dinners, movie night, tons of squash and lots of good times.

Special thanks go out to everyone who helped pull this together:

Thank you to our supporters and volunteers!  The following ESC members/businesses helped to make our camp better:

–          Geoff MacNeil from MacGraphix for making the shirts!

–          Dimensions Graphic Studio (Design, Logo, and Posters)

–          Michael Fouts from OverHaul Fitness who designed our fitness circuit and relay races!

–          Jim Dawson for looking after the fitness circuit on the doubles court

–          Doug Kirillo for running PlaySight for the video analysis

–          Junior coaches!  Mo, Isaac, and Molli – they are so famous, they don’t even need last names.

–          Stephen Atkins for sharing his referee expertise for the clinic

–          Last but not least, the amazing coaches – Ibrahim and Omar

Look for an all ages camp coming up in October.
